data.title: Implement progressive validation in brainstorm SKILL.md
data.description:
Modify plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md in four sections + Quick Reference:

(a) Phase 1 Gate: Replace single-question gate with 3-step transition.
  - Add "### Understanding Summary": structured bullets (problem/users/scope/success), wait for confirmation.
  - Add "### Intent Gap Analysis": self-reflect on inferred content, 1-3 targeted questions, exclude already-confirmed content (explicit "exclude" instruction within section), max 3 questions with opt-in continuation. Explicit instruction: summary confirmation is separate from gap analysis — always proceed to gap analysis.

(b) Phase 2 Step 2: Add "### Provenance Tracking" (four categories: explicit, confirmed-via-gap-question, inferred, researched).

(c) Phase 2 Step 4: Add bold/normal rendering (inferred/researched → bold, explicit/confirmed → normal). Annotation summary line immediately before option list: "N of M criteria confirmed; K inferred requiring review". Explicit instruction: summary confirmation does NOT collapse with gap analysis.

(d) Phase 3 Step 1: Add clean-text instruction: "Strip all bold/provenance markers before writing ticket description."

(e) Quick Reference: Update Phase 1 and Phase 2 rows.

NOTE: These changes do NOT apply to the Enrich-in-Place path (already lightweight).

REQUIRED: Unconditional audit of test-brainstorm-approval-gate.sh — read the file, verify each assertion against new annotation format, document audit result regardless of outcome.

TDD: Task 1's RED tests turn GREEN.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format passes
  Verify: ruff format --check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Task 1 tests pass GREEN
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-progressive-validation.sh
- [ ] Existing approval gate tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-approval-gate.sh
- [ ] Skill file valid
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] No broken REPO_ROOT refs
  Verify: grep -oE '\$REPO_ROOT/[^ )\x60]+' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md | while read p; do test -e "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/${p#\$REPO_ROOT/}" || echo "MISSING: $p"; done | grep -c MISSING | awk '{exit ($1 > 0)}'
- [ ] Quick Reference updated
  Verify: grep -qE 'Understanding Summary|understanding summary' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] Approval gate audit documented
  Verify: true
